label: Logz.io
description: Connect to Logz.io's hosted ELK, Prometheus, and APM platform to ship logs and query observability data.

form.title: Connect Logz.io
form.subtitle: Paste your shipping token and API token to start ingesting logs and querying observability data.

methods.label: Shipping Token + API Token
methods.description: Paste your Logz.io log shipping token (for ingestion) and API token (for queries), then select your account region. The simplest and most common setup path.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with Shipping Token + API Token

You need two separate tokens from Logz.io: a **shipping token** for sending logs and a **API token** for querying data via the Logz.io REST API.

### Get your Shipping Token

1. Log in to [app.logz.io](https://app.logz.io/).
2. Click your account name in the top-right → **Settings → General settings**.
3. Under **Shipping tokens**, copy the **Default** token (or create a dedicated one).

### Get your API Token

1. In Logz.io, go to **Settings → Tools → API tokens**.
2. Click **Add API token**, give it a name like `Anton`, and click **Add**.
3. Copy the generated token — it is shown in full only once.

### Select your Region

- Choose the region that matches your Logz.io account.
- If unsure, check your Logz.io login URL: `app.logz.io` = US, `app-eu.logz.io` = EU, `app-au.logz.io` = AU, `app-ca.logz.io` = CA, `app-wa.logz.io` = WA.

### Notes

- The API token is shown once at creation time — if lost, delete it and create a new one.
- Shipping tokens and API tokens are independent; both are needed for full read/write access.
- Workspace admins can scope API token permissions under **Settings → Tools → API tokens**.

fields.name: shipping_token
fields.label: Log Shipping Token
fields.description: Found in Settings → General settings → Shipping tokens. Used to authenticate log ingestion (Logstash, Filebeat, etc.).

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Found in Settings → Tools → API tokens. Used to query logs, alerts, and dashboards via the Logz.io REST API.

fields.name: region
fields.label: Account Region
fields.description: Select the region of your Logz.io account. Must match the region shown in your Logz.io login URL.

fields.name: account_id
fields.label: Account ID (optional)
fields.description: Your numeric Logz.io account ID. Required for some sub-account API calls. Found in Settings → General settings.

methods.label: Shipping Token Only (Ingest only)
methods.description: Use only a log shipping token if you only need to send logs to Logz.io without querying data back. Suitable for one-way log pipeline setups.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with Shipping Token Only

Use this method if you only need to ship logs to Logz.io and do not require query or read access via the API.

### Get your Shipping Token

1. Log in to [app.logz.io](https://app.logz.io/).
2. Click your account name → **Settings → General settings**.
3. Under **Shipping tokens**, copy the **Default** token or create a dedicated one for Anton.

### Select your Region

- Match the region to your Logz.io account's login URL.
- `app.logz.io` = US, `app-eu.logz.io` = EU, and so on.

### Notes

- Without an API token, Anton can only push data to Logz.io — it cannot read back logs, alerts, or dashboards.
- To add query access later, switch to the **Shipping Token + API Token** method.

fields.name: shipping_token
fields.label: Log Shipping Token
fields.description: Found in Settings → General settings → Shipping tokens. Authenticates log ingestion only.

fields.name: region
fields.label: Account Region
fields.description: Select the region matching your Logz.io account.
